info.title: Traigent Security Contract (registered routes)
info.description: Documented Flask security routes registered in TraigentBackend/src/routes/audit_routes.py. V1: minimal path + method declarations to satisfy the cross-repo conformance gate. Full request/response schemas are follow-up authoring work (Batch 3a). Codex review of Batch 3: response codes replaced with `default` until each handler is traced; this prevents the OpenAPI from contradicting actual handler returns.

get.summary: List recent security events (filtered audit log subset)

default.description: Response shape pending — see Flask handler in TraigentBackend/src/routes/ for actual return shape; full request/response schemas tracked as follow-up.
